commit.message:
Add mm/inches unit setting with live DetailWindow updates

- Add Measurement Units submenu (mm / inches) to Settings menu
- Persist and sync unit preference across all windows
- DetailWindow Calibrated Sheet mode now respects the unit setting:
  - Reference size input label updates to mm or in
  - User's calibration input converted from in→mm internally (px/mm stays canonical)
  - D50/D90 results display in the selected unit
  - Histogram x-axis labels and unit tag update on the fly
- Switching units resets calibration and clears stale results

commit.message:
자기개선 요청 실행 + 계획 이행 accountability 시스템 (#144)

1. 자기개선 요청 실행:
   - [IMPROVE:] 태그 감지 시 Goal로 자동 변환 → 실행 계획 생성 → 자동 실행
   - 일일 리뷰 auto_fix도 Goal로 변환하여 체계적 추적

2. 계획 이행 강화:
   - 미달성(D/F) 작업을 재시도 큐에 추가 (최대 2회 재시도)
   - 2회 실패 시 Goal로 에스컬레이션하여 체계적 재접근
   - 진행 보고에 계획 달성률 표시 (🟢/🟡/🔴)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01HaXmg7QwLhqQYY2C4PHSzp

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Zeiterfassung-Bearbeitung, Multi-Mitarbeiter ausblenden, ZDA→ZA umbenennen, Excel-Footer

- Löschbare bestehende Einträge in Zeiterfassung (Bearbeitung ermöglichen)
- "Weitere Mitarbeiter" Feature ausgeblendet
- ZDA überall zu ZA umbenannt (Excel, UI, Zeitkonten)
- Excel-Footer: nur noch "Datum und Unterschrift"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ARM64 kernel decompression and add smart CI filtering (#80)

* Fix ARM64 kernel decompression and add smart CI filtering

- Use Python gzip.decompress instead of gunzip for ARM64 kernel
  extraction. gunzip exits with code 2 on "trailing garbage" in EFI
  stubs; Python handles this gracefully.

- Add detect-changes job using dorny/paths-filter to skip irrelevant
  CI jobs on PRs. Only build/test what actually changed:
  - cli/ changes → build-cli, test-linux, test-macos, clippy-windows
  - app/ changes → test-frontend, build-tauri
  - Non-PR events (push to master, release) always run everything.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Keep required status checks ungated to avoid blocking PRs

build-cli, test-linux, test-macos are required branch protection
checks — they can't be skipped or PRs won't merge. Only gate
non-required jobs (test-frontend, clippy-windows, build-tauri).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Cogarch: add T15 — PSQ v3 output receiver protocol

Derived from psq-endpoint-001.json + psq-lite-response-001.json interagent
exchanges. Fills gap: no trigger fired when PSQ v3 output entered context,
leaving composite citation, anti-calibrated confidence, and PSQ-Lite
mapping confidence discipline without mechanical enforcement.

T15 checks: composite.status gate, meets_threshold vs raw confidence,
scale discipline (dims 0-10 / composite 0-100), PSQ-Lite mapping at 0.70,
4-dim information-loss flag for triage, WEIRD distribution flag.

commit.message:
Disable Google Translate on site to prevent React DOM crashes

Google Translate wraps text nodes in <font> tags, breaking React's
virtual DOM reconciliation (insertBefore NotFoundError).
Added translate="no" + meta google notranslate.

repository.description: SLABUILDER - Builder Solo Leveling by Gagold Guild

commit.message:
Fix scanner race condition that overwrites browser portfolio saves

Full scan was reading portfolio.json at scan start, then writing it back
2-5 minutes later — overwriting any trades entered during the scan.
Now re-reads the freshest portfolio right before writing scan results.

Also adds (t.cost || t.price * t.shares) fallback on all 5 bare t.cost
sum sites so cost basis displays correctly even if cost field is missing.

commit.message:
Feat/dify rag upgrade 0.3.0 (#11)

* fix(retriever): remove debug logs

* fix(retriever): restore accidentally removed raise_for_status

* chore(dify): update langbot-plugin dependency to 0.2.5

* fix(dify-rag): resolve review issues for RAGEngine migration

P0:
- Fix ingest() signature: use IngestionContext -> IngestionResult instead
  of Any -> Any. Return proper FAILED status with descriptive message
  instead of None (which would crash downstream model_dump())

P1:
- Fix score_threshold schema type: "number" -> "float" (SDK only
  supports string/text/integer/float/boolean/select)
- Fix manifest.yaml component key: "DifyRAGEngine" -> "RAGEngine"
  to match the component kind convention
- Fix delete_document: return False (not True) since Dify datasets
  don't support deletion via this plugin; add warning log

P2:
- Replace traceback.print_exc() with logger.exception()
- Remove unused RAGEngineCapability import
- Remove redundant __kind__ declaration (inherited from RAGEngine)
- Remove leading blank line in file
- Fix inconsistent indentation in get_creation_settings_schema
- Remove unused import (traceback)
- Use public package imports instead of internal module paths

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

* chore: update sdk version to 0.2.6

Move creation_schema from DifyRAGEngine Python methods to dify.yaml spec
section. Restore ja_JP translations from the original KnowledgeRetriever
manifest. Remove schema methods from engine.py.

* chore: update sdk dependency to 0.3.0a1

* refactor: 统一 RAG 插件方法命名，并调整上下文设置访问和 YAML 配置可编辑性。

- Replace removed context.get_top_k() with config-based top_k
- Add top_k to creation_schema in dify.yaml
- Remove obsolete knowledge_retriever component (KnowledgeRetriever removed from SDK)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(dify): implement full RAGEngine ingestion and deletion workflow

Add document upload via Dify Dataset API (create-by-file) and document
deletion support. Declare DOC_INGESTION and DOC_PARSING capabilities so
the frontend allows direct file uploads without requiring an external
parser plugin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(dify): add retrieval_schema with reranking, score threshold and search method controls

Move search_method, top_k, score_threshold from creation_schema to
retrieval_schema so they are adjustable per query. Add reranking support
that auto-fetches model config from Dify dataset settings. Add
score_threshold_enabled toggle with show_if conditional display.
Update docs for all three languages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(parser): add SimpleParser demo and declare DOC_PARSING capability (#17)

* refactor(rag): sync with SDK breaking changes for embedding and vector operations

* chore: bump langbot-plugin to 0.3.0

* chore: update sdk dependency to 0.3.0a1

* refactor: 统一 RAG 插件方法命名，并调整上下文设置访问和 YAML 配置可编辑性。

* Merge pull request #15 from langbot-app/feat/hybrid-search

Feat/hybrid search

* Feat/recursive chunker (#16)

* feat(rag): replace fixed-size chunker with recursive character splitter

The naive sliding-window chunker cuts text at arbitrary character
boundaries, breaking sentences and words mid-way. Replace it with a
recursive character splitter that respects semantic boundaries
(paragraphs → lines → sentences → words → chars), producing more
coherent chunks while keeping the same _chunk_text() interface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(rag): add parent-child index strategy with modular architecture (#13)

Modularize langrag.py into strategy pattern: extract chunking into
chunker.py, add IndexStrategy ABC with ChunkStrategy (preserves
existing behavior) and ParentChildStrategy (two-level chunking where
small child chunks are embedded but parent chunks are returned for
richer context). Add index_type/parent_chunk_size/child_chunk_size
config options. Increase embedding batch size from 10 to 32.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(parser): add SimpleParser demo and declare DOC_PARSING capability

Add SimpleParser as a demo parser plugin implementation.
Declare DOC_PARSING capability on SimpleRAGEngine so the frontend
shows it as a built-in parser option in the upload selector.

commit.message:
Fix critical offline bugs: temp ID remapping, auth kick-out, sync refresh

Critical fixes:
- offlineQueue: Maintain tempId->realId map during sync processing so
  create-then-edit and create-then-delete sequences work correctly.
  URLs containing temp IDs are rewritten to real server IDs.
- api.js: Add suppressAuthRedirect flag, used by queue processor to
  prevent 401 responses from clearing token and redirecting to login
  during background sync (e.g. expired token after long offline period)

High priority fixes:
- Library.jsx: Listen for offline-sync-complete event to refresh songs
  after sync, replacing stale temp-ID entries with real server data
- WorkspaceContext: Queue workspace switch operation when offline so
  server-side active workspace updates on reconnect
- songService/serviceService: Return empty array instead of throwing
  error when offline with no cached data (first-time offline visit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add hole visualizations with OSM data and generated SVG fallback

Three-tier system for showing hole maps during live scoring:
1. Check Supabase cache (course_hole_maps table) first
2. Fetch real polygon data from OpenStreetMap Overpass API
   (fairways, greens, bunkers, tees, water hazards)
3. Fall back to generated SVG diagrams based on par/yardage

Includes:
- OSM golf data fetcher (src/lib/osm-golf.ts)
- HoleDiagram SVG component with real and generated modes
- Hole maps API endpoint with DB caching
- Course coordinate storage for future lookups
- Database migrations for cache tables

Review: ZstdHuffman.lean spec quality audit — deduplicate proofs and eliminate simp_all (#764)

* refactor: replace simp_all with simp only in ZstdHuffman spec

Replace 3 fragile `simp_all [beq_iff_eq]` calls with targeted
`simp only [beq_iff_eq] at *` to improve proof stability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: deduplicate monadic bind peeling in ZstdHuffman spec

Extract `buildZstdHuffmanTable_ok_elim` helper that peels through
the 7 monadic layers of `buildZstdHuffmanTable` once, providing
both `weightsToMaxBits` success and table size preservation.

`buildZstdHuffmanTable_tableSize` and `buildZstdHuffmanTable_maxBits_pos`
are now thin term-mode wrappers. Net reduction: 36 lines (615 → 579).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* doc: progress entry for ZstdHuffman spec quality review

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* doc: skill update — subst leaves struct projections unreduced

Document the pattern where `subst h` with a struct equation leaves
projections like `{ field := e }.field` unreduced in the goal, and
the `constructor` + `rw [← h]` workaround.

  exclusivity conflicts between MJPEG stream and snapshot capture

- Add 3s DNS propagation delay after Cloudflare tunnel URL is found

commit.message:
fix(zsh): suppress zoxide doctor warning via _ZO_DOCTOR=0

The [[ -t 1 ]] guard is unreliable — stdout may be a terminal during
.zshrc sourcing at shell startup but redirected by the time individual
commands run. Set _ZO_DOCTOR=0 unconditionally to suppress the warning
regardless of context.
